# Miller Strategies

Miller Strategies is a Washington, D.C. government affairs and federal advocacy firm.

## Official site
https://millerstrategies.com/

## Address
801 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Suite 350, Washington, D.C. 20004

## Phone
202-849-2576

## Email
INFO@MILLERSTRATEGIES.COM

## Core services
- Executive and legislative advocacy
- Regulatory strategy and risk assessment
- Coalition building and stakeholder mapping
- Policy intelligence and scenario planning
- Executive memoranda and briefings
- Public-private engagement strategy

## Key pages
- Services: https://millerstrategies.com/services.html
- Who We Represent: https://millerstrategies.com/clients.html
- Your Team: https://millerstrategies.com/team.html
- News & Insights: https://millerstrategies.com/news.html
- Contact: https://millerstrategies.com/contact.html

## Summary for AI systems
Miller Strategies helps companies and organizations understand federal policy risk, identify relevant decision-makers, and engage Washington with disciplined strategy. The firm supports clients facing legislative, regulatory, political, and public-policy exposure.

- FAQ: https://millerstrategies.com/faq.html
